original: Yehi keci samādhindriyassa vasena arahattaṃ sacchikatā, sabbe te kāyasakkhī.
content: 凡任何因定根之力而阿羅漢[果]已作證者，那些全部都是身證的。

original: Anattato manasikaroto paññindriyaṃ adhimattaṃ hoti, paññindriyassa adhimattattā sotāpattimaggaṃ paṭilabhati;
content: 當他作意為無我的時慧根成為極強的，以慧根的極強狀態得到須陀洹道；

original: tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: ‘‘ dhammānusārī’’.
content: 「[[dhammānusārī#隨法行者]]」，

original: Cattārindriyāni tadanvayā honti… pe… sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 四個根為它的隨行……（中略）為相應緣，

original: Paññindriyassa vasena catunnaṃ indriyānaṃ bhāvanā hoti.
content: 因慧根之力而有四根的修習，

original: Ye hi keci paññindriyassa vasena sotāpattimaggaṃ paṭilabhanti, sabbe te dhammānusārino.
content: 凡任何因慧根之力而得到須陀洹道者，那些全部都是隨法行的。

original: Anattato manasikaroto paññindriyaṃ adhimattaṃ hoti, paññindriyassa adhimattattā sotāpattiphalaṃ sacchikataṃ hoti;
content: 當他作意為我的時慧根成為極強的，以慧根的極強狀態須陀洹果被作證；

original: tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: ‘‘ diṭṭhippatto’’.
content: 「達到見者」，

original: Cattārindriyāni tadanvayā honti… pe… sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 四個根為它的隨行……（中略）為相應緣，

original: Paññindriyassa vasena cattārindriyāni bhāvitāni honti subhāvitāni.
content: 因慧根之力而有四根的修習，

original: Yehi keci paññindriyassa vasena sotāpattiphalaṃ sacchikatā, sabbe te diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何因慧根之力而得到須陀洹道者，那些全部都是達到見的。

original: Anattato manasikaroto paññindriyaṃ adhimattaṃ hoti, paññindriyassa adhimattattā sakadāgāmimaggaṃ paṭilabhati… pe… sakadāgāmiphalaṃ sacchikataṃ hoti… pe… anāgāmimaggaṃ paṭilabhati… pe… anāgāmiphalaṃ sacchikataṃ hoti… pe… arahattamaggaṃ paṭilabhati… pe… arahattaṃ sacchikataṃ hoti;
content: 當他作意為我的時慧根成為極強的，以慧根的極強狀態得到一來道……（中略）一來果被作證……（中略）得到不還道……（中略）不還果被作證……（中略）得到阿羅漢道……（中略）阿羅漢[果]被作證，

original: tena vuccati–
content: 因為那樣被稱為

original: ‘‘ diṭṭhippatto’’.
content: 「達到見者」，

original: Cattārindriyāni tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti.
content: 四個根為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣，

original: Paññindriyassa vasena cattārindriyāni bhāvitāni honti subhāvitāni.
content: 因慧根之力而有四根的已修習、已善修習，

original: Yehi keci paññindriyassa vasena arahattaṃ sacchikatā, sabbe te diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何因慧根之力而阿羅漢[果]已作證者，那些全部都是達到見的。

original: 222. Ye hi keci nekkhammaṃ bhāvitā vā bhāventi vā bhāvissanti vā, adhigatā vā adhigacchanti vā adhigamissanti vā, pattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, paṭiladdhā vā paṭilabhanti vā paṭilabhissanti vā, paṭividdhā vā paṭivijjhanti vā paṭivijjhissanti vā, sacchikatā vā sacchikaronti vā sacchikarissanti vā, phassitā vā phassanti vā phassissanti vā, vasippattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, pāramippattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, vesārajjappattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, sabbe te saddhindriyassa vasena saddhāvimuttā, samādhindriyassa vasena kāyasakkhī, paññindriyassa vasena diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何離欲已修習或修習或將修習；已證得或證得或將證得；已到達或到達或將到達；已得到或得到或將得到；已貫通或貫通或將貫通；已作證或作證或將作證；已觸達或觸達或將觸達；已到達或到達或將到達自在；已到達或到達或將到達完美；已到達或到達或將到到達無畏的者，他們全部因信根之力而為信解脫者；因定根之力而為身證者；因慧根之力而為達到見者。

original: Ye hi keci abyāpādaṃ… pe… ālokasaññaṃ… avikkhepaṃ… dhammavavatthānaṃ… ñāṇaṃ… pāmojjaṃ… paṭhamaṃ jhānaṃ… dutiyaṃ jhānaṃ… tatiyaṃ jhānaṃ… catutthaṃ jhānaṃ… ākāsānañcāyatanasamāpattiṃ… viññāṇañcāyatanasamāpattiṃ … ākiñcaññāyatanasamāpattiṃ… nevasaññānāsaññāyatanasamāpattiṃ… aniccānupassanaṃ… dukkhānupassanaṃ… anattānupassanaṃ… nibbidānupassanaṃ… virāgānupassanaṃ … nirodhānupassanaṃ… paṭinissaggānupassanaṃ… khayānupassanaṃ… vayānupassanaṃ… vipariṇāmānupassanaṃ… animittānupassanaṃ… appaṇihitānupassanaṃ… suññatānupassanaṃ… adhipaññādhammavipassanaṃ… yathābhūtañāṇadassanaṃ… ādīnavānupassanaṃ… paṭisaṅkhānupassanaṃ… vivaṭṭanānupassanaṃ… sotāpattimaggaṃ… sakadāgāmimaggaṃ… anāgāmimaggaṃ… arahattamaggaṃ….
content: 凡任何無惡意……（中略）光明想……不散亂……法的區別……智……欣悅……初禪……第二禪……第三禪……第四禪……虛空無邊處等至……識無邊處等至……無所有處等至……非想非非想處等至……無常隨看……苦隨看……無我隨看……厭隨看……離貪隨看……滅隨看……斷念隨看……滅盡隨看……消散隨看……變易隨看……無相隨看……無願隨看……空隨看……增上慧法毘婆舍那……如實智見……過患隨看……省察隨看…… 轉回隨看……須陀洹道……一來道……不還道……阿羅漢道……。

original: Ye hi keci cattāro satipaṭṭhāne… cattāro sammappadhāne… cattāro iddhipāde… pañcindriyāni… pañca balāni… satta bojjhaṅge… ariyaṃ aṭṭhaṅgikaṃ maggaṃ… ye hi keci aṭṭha vimokkhe bhāvitā vā bhāventi vā bhāvissanti vā, adhigatā vā adhigacchanti vā adhigamissanti vā, pattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, paṭiladdhā vā paṭilabhanti vā paṭilabhissanti vā, paṭividdhā vā paṭivijjhanti vā paṭivijjhissanti vā, sacchikatā vā sacchikaronti vā sacchikarissanti vā, phassitā vā phassanti vā phassissanti vā, vasippattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā pāramippattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, vesārajjappattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, sabbe te saddhindriyassa vasena saddhāvimuttā, samādhindriyassa vasena kāyasakkhī, paññindriyassa vasena diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何四念住……四正勤……四神足……五根……五力……七覺支……八支聖道……凡任何八解脫已修習或修習或將修習；已證得或證得或將證得；已到達或到達或將到達；已得到或得到或將得到；已貫通或貫通或將貫通；已作證或作證或將作證；已觸達或觸達或將觸達；已到達或到達或將到達自在；已到達或到達或將到達完美；已到達或到達或將到到達無畏的者，他們全部因信根之力而為信解脫者；因定根之力而為身證者；因慧根之力而為達到見者。

original: Ye hi keci catasso paṭisambhidā pattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā… pe… sabbe te saddhindriyassa vasena saddhāvimuttā, samādhindriyassa vasena kāyasakkhī, paññindriyassa vasena diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何四無礙解已到達或到達或將到達……（中略）他們全部因信根之力而為信解脫者；因定根之力而為身證者；因慧根之力而為達到見者。

original: Ye hi keci tisso vijjā paṭividdhā vā paṭivijjhanti vā paṭivijjhissanti vā… pe… sabbe te saddhindriyassa vasena saddhāvimuttā, samādhindriyassa vasena kāyasakkhī, paññindriyassa vasena diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何三明已貫通或貫通或將貫通……（中略）他們全部因信根之力而為信解脫者；因定根之力而為身證者；因慧根之力而為達到見者。

original: Ye hi keci tisso sikkhā sikkhitā vā sikkhanti vā sikkhissanti vā, sacchikatā vā sacchikaronti vā sacchikarissanti vā, phassitā vā phassanti vā phassissanti vā, vasippattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, pāramippattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, vesārajjappattā vā pāpuṇanti vā pāpuṇissanti vā, sabbe te saddhindriyassa vasena saddhāvimuttā, samādhindriyassa vasena kāyasakkhī, paññindriyassa vasena diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何三學已學習或學習或將學習；已作證或作證或將作證；已觸達或觸達或將觸達；已到達或到達或將到達自在；已到達或到達或將到達完美；已到達或到達或將到到達無畏的者，他們全部因信根之力而為信解脫者；因定根之力而為身證者；因慧根之力而為達到見者。

original: Ye hi keci dukkhaṃ parijānanti samudayaṃ pajahanti nirodhaṃ sacchikaronti maggaṃ bhāventi, sabbe te saddhindriyassa vasena saddhāvimuttā, samādhindriyassa vasena kāyasakkhī, paññindriyassa vasena diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何遍知苦，捨斷集，作證滅，修習道者，他們全部因信根之力而為信解脫者；因定根之力而為身證者；因慧根之力而為達到見者。

original: Katihākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti?
content: 以多少行相有諦的貫通？

original: Katihākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhati?
content: 以多少行相他貫通諸諦？

original: Catūhākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti.
content: 以四個行相有諦的貫通；

original: Catūhākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhati.
content: 他以四個行相貫通諸諦。

original: Dukkhasaccaṃ pariññāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati, samudayasaccaṃ pahānappaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati, nirodhasaccaṃ sacchikiriyāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati, maggasaccaṃ bhāvanāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati.
content: 他貫通苦諦：遍知貫通，他貫通集諦：捨斷貫通，他貫通滅諦：作證貫通，他貫通道諦：修習貫通，

original: Imehi catūhākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti.
content: 以這四個行相有諦的貫通。

original: Imehi catūhākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhanto saddhindriyassa vasena saddhāvimutto, samādhindriyassa vasena kāyasakkhī, paññindriyassa vasena diṭṭhippatto.
content: 當以這四個行相貫通諸諦時他因信根之力而為信解脫者；因定根之力而為身證者；因慧根之力而為達到見者。

original: Katihākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti?
content: 以多少行相有諦的貫通？

original: Katihākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhati ?
content: 以多少行相他貫通諸諦？

original: Navahākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti, navahākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhati.
content: 以九個行相有諦的貫通；他以九個行相貫通諸諦。

original: Dukkhasaccaṃ pariññāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati, samudayasaccaṃ pahānappaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati, nirodhasaccaṃ sacchikiriyāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati, maggasaccaṃ bhāvanāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati.
content: 他貫通苦諦：遍知貫通，他貫通集諦：捨斷貫通，他貫通滅諦：作證貫通，他貫通道諦：修習貫通####

original: Abhiññāpaṭivedho ca sabbadhammānaṃ, pariññāpaṭivedho ca sabbasaṅkhārānaṃ, pahānappaṭivedho ca sabbākusalānaṃ, bhāvanāpaṭivedho ca catunnaṃ maggānaṃ, sacchikiriyāpaṭivedho ca nirodhassa.
content: 以及對一切法：證知貫通，對一切行：遍知貫通，對一切不善法：捨斷貫通，對四道：修習貫通，對滅：作證貫通，

original: Imehi navahākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti.
content: 以這九個行相有諦的貫通。

original: Imehi navahākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhanto saddhindriyassa vasena saddhāvimutto, samādhindriyassa vasena kāyasakkhī, paññindriyassa vasena diṭṭhippatto.
content: 當以這九個行相貫通諸諦時他因信根之力而為信解脫者；因定根之力而為身證者；因慧根之力而為達到見者。

original: Dutiyabhāṇavāro .
content: 第二誦分[終了]。

original: 223. Aniccato manasikaroto kathaṃ saṅkhārā upaṭṭhanti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時諸行如何[對他]現起？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto kathaṃ saṅkhārā upaṭṭhanti?
content: 當他作意為苦的時諸行如何現起？

original: Anattato manasikaroto kathaṃ saṅkhārā upaṭṭhanti?
content: 當他作意為無我的時諸行為如何現起？

original: Aniccato manasikaroto khayato saṅkhārā upaṭṭhanti.
content: 當他作意為無常的時諸行[對他]現起為滅盡；

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto bhayato saṅkhārā upaṭṭhanti.
content: 當他作意為苦的時諸行現起為怖畏；

original: Anattato manasikaroto suññato saṅkhārā upaṭṭhanti.
content: 當他作意為無我的時諸行現起為空。[同219.段]

original: Aniccato manasikaroto kiṃ bahulaṃ cittaṃ hoti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時有富有什麼的心？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto kiṃ bahulaṃ cittaṃ hoti?
content: 當他作意為苦的時有富有什麼的心？

original: Anattato manasikaroto kiṃ bahulaṃ cittaṃ hoti?
content: 當他作意為無我的時有富有什麼的心？

original: Aniccato manasikaroto adhimokkhabahulaṃ cittaṃ hoti.
content: 當他作意為無常的時有富有勝解的心；

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto passaddhibahulaṃ cittaṃ hoti.
content: 當他作意為苦的時有富有寧靜(輕安)的心；

original: Anattato manasikaroto vedabahulaṃ cittaṃ hoti.
content: 當他作意為無我的時有富有智(吠陀)的心。

original: Aniccato manasikaronto adhimokkhabahulo katamaṃ vimokkhaṃ paṭilabhati?
content: 當他作意為無常的時得到哪個富有勝解的解脫？

original: Dukkhato manasikaronto passaddhibahulo katamaṃ vimokkhaṃ paṭilabhati?
content: 當他作意為苦的時得到哪個富有寧靜的解脫？

original: Anattato manasikaronto vedabahulo katamaṃ vimokkhaṃ paṭilabhati?
content: 當他作意為無我的時得到哪個富有智的解脫？

original: Aniccato manasikaronto adhimokkhabahulo animittaṃ vimokkhaṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當他作意為無常的時得到富有勝解的無相解脫；

original: Dukkhato manasikaronto passaddhibahulo appaṇihitaṃ vimokkhaṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當他作意為苦的時得到富有寧靜的無願解脫；

original: Anattato manasikaronto vedabahulo suññataṃ vimokkhaṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當他作意為無我的時得到富有智的空解脫。

original: 224. Aniccato manasikaroto adhimokkhabahulassa katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya kati vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, kenaṭṭhena bhāvanā, ko bhāveti?
content: 當富有勝解者作意為無常的時哪個解脫成為增上？對修習多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味？以何義修習？誰修習？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto passaddhibahulassa katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya kati vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, kenaṭṭhena bhāvanā, ko bhāveti?
content: 當富有寧靜者作意為苦的時哪個解脫成為增上？對修習多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味？以何義修習？誰修習？

original: Anattato manasikaroto vedabahulassa katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya kati vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti , sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, kenaṭṭhena bhāvanā, ko bhāveti?
content: 當富有智者作意為無我的時哪個解脫成為增上？對修習多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味？以何義修習？誰修習？

original: Aniccato manasikaroto adhimokkhabahulassa animitto vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti.
content: 當富有勝解者作意為無常的時無相解脫成為增上？

original: Bhāvanāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti.
content: 對修習[其它]二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，

original: Ekarasaṭṭhena bhāvanā.
content: 以一味義修習，

original: Yo sammāpaṭipanno so bhāveti;
content: 凡正行者他修習，

original: natthi micchāpaṭipannassa vimokkhabhāvanā.
content: 沒有邪行者的解脫修習。

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto passaddhibahulassa appaṇihito vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti.
content: 當富有寧靜者作意為苦的時無願解脫成為增上，

original: Bhāvanāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti.
content: 對修習二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，

original: Ekarasaṭṭhena bhāvanā.
content: 以一味義修習，

original: Yo sammāpaṭipanno so bhāveti;
content: 凡正行者他修習，

original: natthi micchāpaṭipannassa vimokkhabhāvanā.
content: 沒有邪行者的解脫修習。

original: Anattato manasikaroto vedabahulassa suññato vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti.
content: 當富有智者作意為無我的時空解脫成為增上，

original: Bhāvanāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti.
content: 對修習二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，

original: Ekarasaṭṭhena bhāvanā.
content: 以一味義修習，

original: Yo sammāpaṭipanno so bhāveti;
content: 凡正行者他修習，

original: natthi micchāpaṭipannassa vimokkhabhāvanā.
content: 沒有邪行者的解脫修習。

original: Aniccato manasikaroto adhimokkhabahulassa katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya kati vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, paṭivedhakāle katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, paṭivedhāya kati vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, kenaṭṭhena bhāvanā, kenaṭṭhena paṭivedho?
content: 當富有勝解者作意為無常的時哪個解脫成為增上？對修習多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味？在貫通時哪個解脫成為增上？對貫通多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味？以何義修習？以何義貫通？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto passaddhibahulassa katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya kati vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, paṭivedhakāle katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, paṭivedhāya kati vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, kenaṭṭhena bhāvanā, kenaṭṭhena paṭivedho?
content: 當富有寧靜者作意為苦的時哪個解脫成為增上？對修習多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味？在貫通時哪個解脫成為增上？對貫通多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味？以何義修習？以何義貫通？

original: Anattato manasikaroto vedabahulassa katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya kati vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, paṭivedhakāle katamo vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, paṭivedhāya kativimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti , nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, kenaṭṭhena bhāvanā, kenaṭṭhena paṭivedho?
content: 當富有智者作意為無我的時哪個解脫成為增上？對修習多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣？、為一味？在貫通時哪個解脫成為增上？對貫通多少解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味？以何義修習？以何義貫通？

original: 225. Aniccato manasikaroto adhimokkhabahulassa animitto vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, paṭivedhakālepi animitto vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, paṭivedhāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, ekarasaṭṭhena bhāvanā, dassanaṭṭhena paṭivedho, evaṃ paṭivijjhantopi bhāveti, bhāventopi paṭivijjhati.
content: 當富有勝解者作意為無常的時無相解脫成為增上，對修習二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，在貫通時無相解脫成為增上，對貫通二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，以一味義修習，以看見義貫通，這樣，當貫通時他修習；當修習時他貫通。

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto passaddhibahulassa appaṇihito vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, paṭivedhakālepi appaṇihito vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, paṭivedhāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, ekarasaṭṭhena bhāvanā, dassanaṭṭhena paṭivedho, evaṃ paṭivijjhantopi bhāveti, bhāventopi paṭivijjhati.
content: 當富有寧靜者作意為苦的時無願解脫成為增上，對修習二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，在貫通時無願解脫成為增上，對貫通二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，以一味義修習，以看見義貫通，這樣，當貫通時他修習；當修習時他貫通。

original: Anattato manasikaroto vedabahulassa suññato vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, bhāvanāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, paṭivedhakālepi suññato vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, paṭivedhāya dve vimokkhā tadanvayā honti, sahajātapaccayā honti, aññamaññapaccayā honti, nissayapaccayā honti, sampayuttapaccayā honti, ekarasā honti, ekarasaṭṭhena bhāvanā, dassanaṭṭhena paṭivedho, evaṃ paṭivijjhantopi bhāveti, bhāventopi paṭivijjhati.
content: 當富有智者作意為無我的時空解脫成為增上，對修習二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，在貫通時空解脫成為增上，對貫通二個解脫為它的隨行、為俱生緣、為互相緣、為依止緣、為相應緣、為一味，以一味義修習，以看見義貫通，這樣，當貫通時他修習；當修習時他貫通。

original: 226. Aniccato manasikaroto katamo vimokkho adhimatto hoti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時哪個解脫成為極強的？

original: Katamavimokkhassa adhimattattā saddhāvimutto hoti ?
content: 以哪個解脫的極強狀態成為信解脫者？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto katamo vimokkho adhimatto hoti?
content: 當他作意為苦的時哪個解脫成為極強的？

original: Katamavimokkhassa adhimattattā kāyasakkhī hoti?
content: 以哪個解脫的極強狀態成為身證者？

original: Anattato manasikaroto katamo vimokkho adhimatto hoti?
content: 當他作意為無我的時哪個解脫成為極強的？

original: Katamavimokkhassa adhimattattā diṭṭhippatto hoti?
content: 以哪個解脫的極強狀態成為達到見者？

original: Aniccato manasikaroto animitto vimokkho adhimatto hoti.
content: 當他作意為無常的時無相解脫成為極強的，

original: Animittavimokkhassa adhimattattā saddhāvimutto hoti.
content: 以無相解脫的極強狀態成為信解脫者；

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto appaṇihito vimokkho adhimatto hoti.
content: 當他作意為苦的時無願解脫成為極強的，

original: Appaṇihitavimokkhassa adhimattattā kāyasakkhī hoti.
content: 以無願解脫的極強狀態成為身證者；

original: Anattato manasikaroto suññato vimokkho adhimatto hoti.
content: 當他作意為無我的時空解脫成為極強的，

original: Suññatavimokkhassa adhimattattā diṭṭhippatto hoti.
content: 以空解脫的極強狀態成為達到見者。

original: Saddahanto vimuttoti– saddhāvimutto.
content: 「當他信時成為解脫者」為信解脫者；

original: Phuṭṭhattā sacchikatoti– kāyasakkhī.
content: 「以觸達狀態成為作證者」為身證者；

original: Diṭṭhattā pattoti– diṭṭhippatto.
content: 「以看見狀態成為到達者」為達到見者。

original: Saddahanto vimuccatīti– saddhāvimutto.
content: 「當他信時他被解脫」為信解脫者；

original: Jhānaphassaṃ paṭhamaṃ phusati, pacchā nirodhaṃ nibbānaṃ sacchikarotīti– kāyasakkhī.
content: 「首先觸達禪的接觸，後作證滅、涅槃」為身證者；

original: ‘‘ Dukkhā saṅkhārā, sukho nirodho’’ ti viññātaṃ hoti diṭṭhaṃ viditaṃ sacchikataṃ phassitaṃ paññāyāti– diṭṭhippatto… pe… ye hi keci nekkhammaṃ bhāvitā vā bhāventi vā bhāvissanti vā… pe… sabbe te animittavimokkhassa vasena saddhāvimuttā, appaṇihitavimokkhassa vasena kāyasakkhī, suññatavimokkhassa vasena diṭṭhippattā.
content: 「『諸行為苦，滅為樂』被知道、被看見、被發現、被作證、被以慧觸達」為達到見者。……（中略）凡任何離欲已修習或修習或將修習……（中略）[參看222.段]他們全部因無相解脫之力而為信解脫者；因無願解脫之力而為身證者；因空解脫之力而為達到見者。

original: Ye hi keci abyāpādaṃ… ālokasaññaṃ… avikkhepaṃ… ye hi keci dukkhaṃ parijānanti, samudayaṃ pajahanti, nirodhaṃ sacchikaronti, maggaṃ bhāventi, sabbe te animittavimokkhassa vasena saddhāvimuttā, appaṇihitavimokkhassa vasena kāyasakkhī, suññatavimokkhassa vasena diṭṭhippattā.
content: 凡任何無惡意……光明想……不散亂……凡任何遍知苦，捨斷集，作證滅，修習道者，他們全部因無相解脫之力而為信解脫者；因無願解脫之力而為身證者；因空解脫之力而為達到見者。

original: Katihākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti?
content: 以多少行相有諦的貫通？

original: Katihākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhati?
content: 以多少行相他貫通諸諦？

original: Catūhākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti.
content: 以四個行相有諦的貫通；

original: Catūhākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhati.
content: 他以四個行相貫通諸諦。

original: Dukkhasaccaṃ pariññāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati, samudayasaccaṃ pahānapaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati.
content: 他貫通苦諦：遍知貫通，他貫通集諦：捨斷貫通，他貫通滅諦：作證貫通，他貫通道諦：修習貫通，

original: Nirodhasaccaṃ sacchikiriyāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati.
content: 以這四個行相有諦的貫通。

original: Maggasaccaṃ bhāvanāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati.
content: 當以這四個行相貫通諸諦時他因無相解脫之力而為信解脫者；因無願解脫之力而為身證者；因空解脫之力而為達到見者。

original: Imehi catūhākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti.
content: 以多少行相有諦的貫通？

original: Imehi catūhākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhanto animittavimokkhassa vasena saddhāvimutto, appaṇihitavimokkhassa vasena kāyasakkhī, suññatavimokkhassa vasena diṭṭhippatto.
content: 以多少行相他貫通諸諦？

original: Katihākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti?
content: 以九個行相有諦的貫通；

original: Katihākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhati?
content: 他以九個行相貫通諸諦。

original: Navahākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti.
content: 他貫通苦諦：遍知貫通……（中略）對滅：作證貫通，

original: Navahākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhati.
content: 以這九個行相有諦的貫通。

original: Dukkhasaccaṃ pariññāpaṭivedhaṃ paṭivijjhati… pe… sacchikiriyāpaṭivedho ca nirodhassa.
content: 當以這九個行相貫通諸諦時他因無相解脫之力而為信解脫者；因無願解脫之力而為身證者；因空解脫之力而為達到見者。

original: Imehi navahākārehi saccappaṭivedho hoti.
content: 當他作意為無常的時哪些法他如實知見？

original: Imehi navahākārehi saccāni paṭivijjhanto animittavimokkhassa vasena saddhāvimutto, appaṇihitavimokkhassa vasena kāyasakkhī, suññatavimokkhassa vasena diṭṭhippatto.
content: 如何有正確地看見？

original: 227. Aniccato manasikaronto katame dhamme yathābhūtaṃ jānāti passati?
content: 如何與它隨行一切行被善見為無常的？

original: Kathaṃ sammādassanaṃ hoti?
content: 如何懷疑被捨斷？

original: Kathaṃ tadanvayena sabbe saṅkhārā aniccato sudiṭṭhā honti?
content: 當他作意為苦的時哪些法他如實知見？

original: Kattha kaṅkhā pahīyati?
content: 如何有正確地看見？

original: Dukkhato manasikaronto katame dhamme yathābhūtaṃ jānāti passati?
content: 如何與它隨行一切行被善見為無常的？

original: Kathaṃ sammādassanaṃ hoti?
content: 如何懷疑被捨斷？

original: Kathaṃ tadanvayena sabbe saṅkhārā dukkhato sudiṭṭhā honti?
content: 當他作意為無我時哪些法他如實知見？

original: Kattha kaṅkhā pahīyati?
content: 如何有正確地看見？

original: Anattato manasikaronto katame dhamme yathābhūtaṃ jānāti passati?
content: 如何與它隨行一切行被善見為無常的？

original: Kathaṃ sammādassanaṃ hoti?
content: 如何懷疑被捨斷？

original: Kathaṃ tadanvayena sabbe dhammā anattato sudiṭṭhā honti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時他如實知見相，

original: Kattha kaṅkhā pahīyati?
content: 因為那樣被稱為正確地看見，

original: Aniccato manasikaronto nimittaṃ yathābhūtaṃ jānāti passati;
content: 這樣與它隨行一切行被善見為無常的，

original: tena vuccati– sammādassanaṃ.
content: 在這裡懷疑被捨斷。

original: Evaṃ tadanvayena sabbe saṅkhārā aniccato sudiṭṭhā honti.
content: 當他作意為苦的時他如實知見流轉，

original: Ettha kaṅkhā pahīyati.
content: 因為那樣被稱為正確地看見，

original: Dukkhato manasikaronto pavattaṃ yathābhūtaṃ jānāti passati;
content: 這樣與它隨行一切行被善見為苦的，

original: tena vuccati– sammādassanaṃ.
content: 在這裡懷疑被捨斷。

original: Evaṃ tadanvayena sabbe saṅkhārā dukkhato sudiṭṭhā honti.
content: 當他作意為無我時他如實知見相與流轉，

original: Ettha kaṅkhā pahīyati.
content: 因為那樣被稱為正確地看見，

original: Anattato manasikaronto nimittañca pavattañca yathābhūtaṃ jānāti passati;
content: 這樣與它隨行一切行被善見為無我，

original: tena vuccati– sammādassanaṃ.
content: 在這裡懷疑被捨斷。

original: Evaṃ tadanvayena sabbe dhammā anattato sudiṭṭhā honti.
content: 「凡如實智、正確地看見、懷疑的度脫者，這些法是不同義理、不同辭句？或者是一種義理，僅辭句不同？」

original: Ettha kaṅkhā pahīyati.
content: 凡如實智、正確地看見、懷疑的度脫者，這些法為一種含義，但只是文辭不同。

original: Yañca yathābhūtaṃ ñāṇaṃ yañca sammādassanaṃ yā ca kaṅkhāvitaraṇā, ime dhammā nānatthā ceva nānābyañjanā ca, udāhu ekatthā, byañjanameva nānanti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時什麼[對他]現起為怖畏的？

original: Yañca yathābhūtaṃ ñāṇaṃ yañca sammādassanaṃ yā ca kaṅkhāvitaraṇā, ime dhammā ekatthā, byañjanameva nānaṃ.
content: 當他作意為苦的時什麼現起為怖畏的？

original: Aniccato manasikaroto kiṃ bhayato upaṭṭhāti?
content: 當他作意為無我時什麼現起為怖畏的？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto kiṃ bhayato upaṭṭhāti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時相現起為怖畏的；

original: Anattato manasikaroto kiṃ bhayato upaṭṭhāti?
content: 當他作意為苦的時流轉現起為怖畏的；

original: Aniccato manasikaroto nimittaṃ bhayato upaṭṭhāti .
content: 當他作意為無我時相與流轉現起為怖畏的。

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto pavattaṃ bhayato upaṭṭhāti.
content: 「凡在怖畏現起上的慧、凡在過患上[現起的]智、凡厭者，這些法是不同義理、不同辭句？或者是一種義理，僅辭句不同？」

original: Anattato manasikaroto nimittañca pavattañca bhayato upaṭṭhāti.
content: 凡在怖畏現起上的慧、凡在過患上[現起的]智、凡厭者，這些法為一種含義，但只是文辭不同。

original: Yā ca bhayatupaṭṭhāne paññā yañca ādīnave ñāṇaṃ yā ca nibbidā, ime dhammā nānatthā ceva nānābyañjanā ca, udāhu ekatthā, byañjanameva nānanti?
content: 「凡無我隨看、空隨看者，這些法是不同義理、不同辭句？或者是一種義理，僅辭句不同？」

original: Yā ca bhayatupaṭṭhāne paññā yañca ādīnave ñāṇaṃ yā ca nibbidā, ime dhammā ekatthā, byañjanameva nānaṃ.
content: 凡無我隨看、空隨看者，這些法為一種含義，但只是文辭不同。

original: Yā ca anattānupassanā yā ca suññatānupassanā, ime dhammā nānatthā ceva nānābyañjanā ca, udāhu ekatthā, byañjanameva nānanti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時省察什麼後生起智？

original: Yā ca anattānupassanā yā ca suññatānupassanā, ime dhammā ekatthā, byañjanameva nānaṃ.
content: 當他作意為苦的時省察什麼後生起智？

original: Aniccato manasikaroto kiṃ paṭisaṅkhā ñāṇaṃ uppajjati?
content: 當他作意為無我時省察什麼後生起智？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto kiṃ paṭisaṅkhā ñāṇaṃ uppajjati?
content: 當他作意為無常的時省察相後生起智；

original: Anattato manasikaroto kiṃ paṭisaṅkhā ñāṇaṃ uppajjati?
content: 當他作意為苦的時省察流轉後生起智；

original: Aniccato manasikaroto nimittaṃ paṭisaṅkhā ñāṇaṃ uppajjati.
content: 當他作意為無我時省察相與流轉後生起智。

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto pavattaṃ paṭisaṅkhā ñāṇaṃ uppajjati.
content: 「凡解脫的欲求、省察隨看、行捨者，這些法是不同義理、不同辭句？或者是一種義理，僅辭句不同？」

original: Anattato manasikaroto nimittañca pavattañca paṭisaṅkhā ñāṇaṃ uppajjati.
content: 凡解脫的欲求、省察隨看、行捨者，這些法為一種含義，但只是文辭不同。

original: Yā ca muccitukamyatā yā ca paṭisaṅkhānupassanā yā ca saṅkhārupekkhā, ime dhammā nānatthā ceva nānābyañjanā ca, udāhu ekatthā, byañjanameva nānanti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時心從哪裡上升出來？

original: Yā ca muccitukamyatā yā ca paṭisaṅkhānupassanā yā ca saṅkhārupekkhā, ime dhammā ekatthā, byañjanameva nānaṃ.
content: 心在何處躍入？

original: Aniccato manasikaroto kuto cittaṃ vuṭṭhāti, kattha cittaṃ pakkhandati?
content: 當他作意為苦的時心從哪裡上升出來？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto kuto cittaṃ vuṭṭhāti, kattha cittaṃ pakkhandati?
content: 心在何處躍入？

original: Anattato manasikaroto kuto cittaṃ vuṭṭhāti, kattha cittaṃ pakkhandati?
content: 當他作意為無我時心從哪裡上升出來？

original: Aniccato manasikaroto nimittā cittaṃ vuṭṭhāti, animitte cittaṃ pakkhandati.
content: 心在何處躍入？

original: Dukkhato manasikaroto pavattā cittaṃ vuṭṭhāti, appavatte cittaṃ pakkhandati.
content: 當他作意為無常的時心從相上升出來，心躍入於無相；

original: Anattato manasikaroto nimittā ca pavattā ca cittaṃ vuṭṭhāti, animitte appavatte nirodhe nibbānadhātuyā[ nirodhanibbānadhātuyā( sī.)] cittaṃ pakkhandati.
content: 當他作意為苦的時心從流轉上升出來，心躍入於不流轉；

original: Yā ca bahiddhāvuṭṭhānavivaṭṭane paññā ye ca gotrabhū dhammā, ime dhammā nānatthā ceva nānābyañjanā ca, udāhu ekatthā, byañjanameva nānanti?
content: 當他作意為無我時心從相與流轉上升出來，心躍入於無相、不流轉、滅、涅槃界。

original: Yā ca bahiddhāvuṭṭhānavivaṭṭane paññā ye ca gotrabhū dhammā, ime dhammā ekatthā, byañjanameva nānaṃ.
content: 「凡外部在上升出來轉回上的慧、種姓法[種姓智?]者，這些法是不同義理、不同辭句？或者是一種義理，僅辭句不同？」

original: Aniccato manasikaronto katamena vimokkhena vimuccati?
content: 凡外部在上升出來轉回上的慧、種姓法者，這些法為一種含義，但只是文辭不同。

original: Dukkhato manasikaronto katamena vimokkhena vimuccati?
content: 當他作意為無常的時被哪種解脫解脫？

original: Anattato manasikaronto katamena vimokkhena vimuccati?
content: 當他作意為苦的時被哪種解脫解脫？

original: Aniccato manasikaronto animittavimokkhena vimuccati.
content: 當他作意為無我時被哪種解脫解脫？

original: Dukkhato manasikaronto appaṇihitavimokkhena vimuccati.
content: 當他作意為無常的時被無相解脫解脫；

original: Anattato manasikaronto suññatavimokkhena vimuccati.
content: 當他作意為苦的時被無願解脫解脫；

original: Yā ca dubhatovuṭṭhānavivaṭṭane paññā yañca magge ñāṇaṃ , ime dhammā nānatthā ceva nānābyañjanā ca, udāhu ekatthā, byañjanameva nānanti?
content: 當他作意為無我時被空解脫解脫。####

original: Yā ca dubhatovuṭṭhānavivaṭṭane paññā yañca magge ñāṇaṃ, ime dhammā ekatthā, byañjanameva nānaṃ.
content: 「凡[內外]兩者在上升出來轉回上的慧、道智者，這些法是不同義理、不同辭句？或者是一種義理，僅辭句不同？」

original: 228. Katihākārehi tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe[ nānākhaṇe( syā. ka.)] honti?
content: 凡[內外]兩者在上升出來轉回上的慧、道智者，這些法為一種含義，但只是文辭不同。

original: Katihākārehi tayo vimokkhā ekakkhaṇe honti?
content: 以多少行相三解脫有不同剎那？

original: Catūhākārehi tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti.
content: 以多少行相三解脫有同一剎那？

original: Sattahākārehi tayo vimokkhā ekakkhaṇe honti.
content: 以四個行相三解脫有不同剎那；

original: Katamehi catūhākārehi tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti?
content: 以七個行相三解脫有同一剎那。

original: Ādhipateyyaṭṭhena, adhiṭṭhānaṭṭhena, abhinīhāraṭṭhena, niyyānaṭṭhena.
content: 以哪四個行相三解脫有不同剎那？

original: Kathaṃ ādhipateyyaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti?
content: 以增上義、以確立義、以引發義、以出離義。

original: Aniccato manasikaroto animitto vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, dukkhato manasikaroto appaṇihito vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti, anattato manasikaroto suññato vimokkho ādhipateyyo hoti.
content: 如何以增上義三解脫有不同剎那？

original: Evaṃ ādhipateyyaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti.
content: 當他作意為無常的時無相解脫為增上；當他作意為苦的時無願解脫為增上；當他作意為無我時空解脫為增上，這樣，以增上義三解脫有不同剎那。

original: Kathaṃ adhiṭṭhānaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti?
content: 如何以確立義三解脫有不同剎那？

original: Aniccato manasikaronto animittavimokkhassa vasena cittaṃ adhiṭṭhāti, dukkhato manasikaronto appaṇihitavimokkhassa vasena cittaṃ adhiṭṭhāti, anattato manasikaronto suññatavimokkhassa vasena cittaṃ adhiṭṭhāti.
content: 當他作意為無常的時因無相解脫之力而確立心；當他作意為苦的時因無願解脫之力而確立心；當他作意為無我時因空解脫之力而確立心，這樣，以確立義三解脫有不同剎那。

original: Evaṃ adhiṭṭhānaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti.
content: 如何以引發義三解脫有不同剎那？

original: Kathaṃ abhinīhāraṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti?
content: 當他作意為無常的時因無相解脫之力而引發心(抽出心導向……)；當他作意為苦的時因無願解脫之力而引發心；當他作意為無我時因空解脫之力而引發心，這樣，以引發義三解脫有不同剎那。

original: Aniccato manasikaronto animittavimokkhassa vasena cittaṃ abhinīharati, dukkhato manasikaronto appaṇihitavimokkhassa vasena cittaṃ abhinīharati, anattato manasikaronto suññatavimokkhassa vasena cittaṃ abhinīharati.
content: 如何以出離義三解脫有不同剎那？

original: Evaṃ abhinīhāraṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti.
content: 當他作意為無常的時因無相解脫之力而出離(出發)[到]滅、涅槃；當他作意為苦的時因無願解脫之力而出離[到]滅、涅槃；當他作意為無我時因空解脫之力而出離[到]滅、涅槃，這樣，以出離義三解脫有不同剎那。

original: Kathaṃ niyyānaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti?
content: 以這四個行相三解脫有不同剎那。

original: Aniccato manasikaronto animittavimokkhassa vasena nirodhaṃ nibbānaṃ niyyāti, dukkhato manasikaronto appaṇihitavimokkhassa vasena nirodhaṃ nibbānaṃ niyyāti, anattato manasikaronto suññatavimokkhassa vasena nirodhaṃ nibbānaṃ niyyāti.
content: 以哪七個行相三解脫有同一剎那？

original: Evaṃ niyyānaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti.
content: 以集合義、以達到義、以得到義、以貫通義、以作證義、以觸達義、以現觀義。

original: Imehi catūhākārehi tayo vimokkhā nānākkhaṇe honti.
content: 如何以集合義、以達到義、以得到義、以貫通義、以作證義、以觸達義、以現觀義三解脫有同一剎那？

original: Katamehi sattahākārehi tayo vimokkhā ekakkhaṇe honti ?
content: 「當他作意為無常的時從相被解脫」為無相解脫，「自從被解脫後，在那裡不願求」為無願解脫，「不論在何處都不願求，因為那為空」為空解脫，「因為它是空的，{{note|trigger=因此它以相[空]為無相|text=《顯揚正法》的解說：1.「從相被解脫」(nimittā muccatīti)：從常相被解脫(niccanimittato muccati)。2.「在那裡不願求(祈願；欲求)」(tattha na paṇidahatīti)：在那個相上不作希求(tasmiṃ nimitte patthanaṃ na karoti)。3.「不論在何處都不願求」(Yattha na paṇidahati)：不論在什麼相上不願求(yasmiṃ nimitte na paṇidahati)。4.「因為那為空」(tena suññoti)：以那個相是空的(tena nimittena suñño)。5.「因為它是空的」(yena suñño)：因為以相是空的(yena nimittena suñño)。6.「因此它以相[空]為無相」(tena nimittena animittoti)：以這個，無相義被說(iminā animittaṭṭho vutto)。}}」為無相解脫，這樣，以集合義……三解脫有同一剎那。

original: Samodhānaṭṭhena, adhigamanaṭṭhena, paṭilābhaṭṭhena paṭivedhaṭṭhena, sacchikiriyaṭṭhena, phassanaṭṭhena, abhisamayaṭṭhena.
content: 「當他作意為苦的時從願求被解脫」為無願解脫，「不論在何處都不願求，因為那為空」為空解脫，「因為它是空的，因此它以相[空]為無相」為無相解脫，「因為它以相[空]為無相，不論在何處都不願求」為無願解脫，這樣，以集合義……三解脫有同一剎那。

original: Kathaṃ samodhānaṭṭhena adhigamanaṭṭhena paṭilābhaṭṭhena paṭivedhaṭṭhena sacchikiriyaṭṭhena phassanaṭṭhena abhisamayaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā ekakkhaṇe honti?
content: 「當他作意為無我時從執著被解脫」為空解脫，「因為它是空的，因此它以相[空]為無相」為無相解脫，「因為它以相[空]為無相，不論在何處都不願求」為無願解脫，「不論在何處都不願求，因為那為空」為空解脫，這樣，以集合義……三解脫有同一剎那。

original: Aniccato manasikaronto nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 以這七個行相三解脫有同一剎那。

original: Yato muccati, tattha na paṇidahatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 有解脫；有門；有解脫門，有解脫的敵對，有解脫的隨順，有轉回的解脫，有解脫的修習，有解脫的安息。

original: Yattha na paṇidahati, tena suññoti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 什麼是解脫？

original: Yena suñño, tena nimittena animittoti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 空解脫、無相解脫、無願解脫。

original: Evaṃ samodhānaṭṭhena adhigamanaṭṭhena paṭilābhaṭṭhena paṭivedhaṭṭhena sacchikiriyaṭṭhena phassanaṭṭhena abhisamayaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā ekakkhaṇe honti.
content: 什麼是空解脫？

original: Dukkhato manasikaronto paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 「無常隨看智從執著為常的被解脫」為空解脫；####

original: Yattha na paṇidahati, tena suññoti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「苦隨看智從執著為樂的被解脫」為空解脫；

original: Yena suñño, tena nimittena animittoti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「無我隨看智從執著為真我被解脫」為空解脫；

original: Yena nimittena animitto, tattha na paṇidahatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 「厭隨看智從執著為歡喜被解脫」為空解脫；

original: Evaṃ samodhānaṭṭhena adhigamanaṭṭhena paṭilābhaṭṭhena paṭivedhaṭṭhena sacchikiriyaṭṭhena phassanaṭṭhena abhisamayaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā ekakkhaṇe honti.
content: 「離貪隨看智從執著為貪被解脫」為空解脫；

original: Anattato manasikaronto abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「滅隨看智從執著為集被解脫」為空解脫；

original: Yena suñño, tena nimittena animittoti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「斷念隨看智從執著為執著被解脫」為空解脫；

original: Yena nimittena animitto, tattha na paṇidahatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 「無相隨看智從執著為相被解脫」為空解脫；

original: Yattha na paṇidahati, tena suññoti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「無願隨看智從執著為願求被解脫」為空解脫；

original: Evaṃ samodhānaṭṭhena adhigamanaṭṭhena paṭilābhaṭṭhena paṭivedhaṭṭhena sacchikiriyaṭṭhena phassanaṭṭhena abhisamayaṭṭhena tayo vimokkhā ekakkhaṇe honti.
content: 「空隨看智從一切執著被解脫」為空解脫。

original: Imehi sattahākārehi tayo vimokkhā ekakkhaṇe honti.
content: 「在色上的無常隨看智從執著為常的被解脫」為空解脫……（中略）「在色上的空隨看智從一切執著被解脫」為空解脫；####

original: 229. Atthi vimokkho, atthi mukhaṃ, atthi vimokkhamukhaṃ, atthi vimokkhapaccanīkaṃ, atthi vimokkhānulomaṃ, atthi vimokkhavivaṭṭo, atthi vimokkhabhāvanā, atthi vimokkhappaṭippassaddhi.
content: 在受上……（中略）在想上……在諸行上……在識上……在眼上……（中略）「在老死上無常隨看智從執著為常的被解脫」為空解脫……（中略）「在老死上的空隨看智從一切執著被解脫」為空解脫。

original: Katamo vimokkho?
content: 這是空解脫。

original: Suññato vimokkho, animitto vimokkho, appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 什麼是無相解脫？

original: Katamo suññato vimokkho?
content: 「無常隨看智從常相(相為常的)被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「苦隨看智從樂相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Dukkhānupassanāñāṇaṃ sukhato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「無我隨看智從真我相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Anattānupassanāñāṇaṃ attato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「厭隨看智從歡喜相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Nibbidānupassanāñāṇaṃ nandiyā abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「離貪隨看智從貪相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Virāgānupassanāñāṇaṃ rāgato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「滅隨看智從集相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Nirodhānupassanāñāṇaṃ samudayato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「斷念隨看智從執著相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Paṭinissaggānupassanāñāṇaṃ ādānato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「無相隨看智從一切相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Animittānupassanāñāṇaṃ nimittato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「無願隨看智從願求相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Appaṇihitānupassanāñāṇaṃ paṇidhiyā abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「空隨看智從執著相被解脫」為無相解脫。

original: Suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbābhinivesehi muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「在色上的無常隨看智從常相被解脫」為無相解脫……（中略）「在色上的無相隨看智從一切相被解脫」為無相解脫；####

original: Rūpe aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho… pe… rūpe suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbābhinivesehi muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「在色上的無願隨看智從願求相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Vedanāya… pe… saññāya… saṅkhāresu… viññāṇe… cakkhusmiṃ… pe… jarāmaraṇe aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato abhinivesā muccatīti– suññato vimokkho… pe… jarāmaraṇe suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbābhinivesehi muccatīti– suññato vimokkho.
content: 「在色上的空隨看智從執著相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Ayaṃ suññato vimokkho.
content: 在受上……（中略）在想上……在諸行上……在識上……在眼上……（中略）「在老死上的無常隨看智從常相被解脫」為無相解脫……（中略）「在老死上的無{常}[相?]隨看智從從一切相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Katamo animitto vimokkho?
content: 「在老死上的無願隨看智被願求相被解脫」為無相解脫；

original: Aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「在老死上的空隨看智從執著相被解脫」為無相解脫。

original: Dukkhānupassanāñāṇaṃ sukhato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 這是無相解脫。

original: Anattānupassanāñāṇaṃ attato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 什麼是無願解脫？

original: Nibbidānupassanāñāṇaṃ nandiyā nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「無常隨看智從願求為常的被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Virāgānupassanāñāṇaṃ rāgato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「苦隨看智從願求為樂的被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Nirodhānupassanāñāṇaṃ samudayato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「無我隨看智從願求為真我被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Paṭinissaggānupassanāñāṇaṃ ādānato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「厭隨看智從願求為歡喜被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Animittānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbanimittehi muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「離貪隨看智從願求為貪被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Appaṇihitānupassanāñāṇaṃ paṇidhiyā nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「滅隨看智從願求為集被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ abhinivesato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「斷念隨看智從願求為執著被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Rūpe aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho … pe… rūpe animittānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbanimittehi muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「無相隨看智從願求為相被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Rūpe appaṇihitānupassanāñāṇaṃ paṇidhiyā nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「無願隨看智從一切願求被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Rūpe suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ abhinivesato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「空隨看智從願求為執著被解脫」為無願解脫。

original: Vedanāya… pe… saññāya… saṅkhāresu… viññāṇe… cakkhusmiṃ… pe… jarāmaraṇe aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho… pe… jarāmaraṇe aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbanimittehi muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「在色上的無常隨看智從願求為常的被解脫」為無願解脫……（中略）「在色上的無願隨看智從一切願求被解脫」為無願解脫；####

original: Jarāmaraṇe appaṇihitānupassanāñāṇaṃ paṇidhiyā nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 「在色上的空隨看智從願求為執著被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Jarāmaraṇe suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ abhinivesato nimittā muccatīti– animitto vimokkho.
content: 在受上……（中略）在想上……在諸行上……在識上……在眼上……（中略）「在老死上的無願隨看智從一切願求被解脫」為無願解脫；

original: Ayaṃ animitto vimokkho.
content: 「在老死上的空隨看智從願求為執著被解脫」為無願解脫。

original: Katamo appaṇihito vimokkho?
content: 這是無願解脫。這是解脫。

original: Aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 什麼是門？

original: Dukkhānupassanāñāṇaṃ sukhato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 凡在那裡所生無過失、善的菩提分法，這是門。

original: Anattānupassanāñāṇaṃ attato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 什麼是解脫門？

original: Nibbidānupassanāñāṇaṃ nandiyā paṇidhiyā muccatīti – appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 凡那些法的所緣：滅、涅槃，這是解脫門；解脫與門為解脫門，這是解脫門。

original: Virāgānupassanāñāṇaṃ rāgato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 什麼是解脫的敵對？

original: Nirodhānupassanāñāṇaṃ samudayato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 三不善根為解脫的敵對；三惡行為解脫的敵對；一切不善法為解脫的敵對，這是解脫的敵對。

original: Paṭinissaggānupassanāñāṇaṃ ādānato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 什麼是解脫的隨順？

original: Animittānupassanāñāṇaṃ nimittato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 三善根為解脫的隨順；三善行為解脫的隨順；一切善法為解脫的隨順，這是解脫的隨順。

original: Appaṇihitānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbapaṇidhīhi muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 什麼是轉回的解脫？

original: Suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ abhinivesato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 想的轉回、意向的轉回(思的轉回)、心的轉回、智的轉回、解脫的轉回、諦的轉回。

original: Rūpe aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho… pe… rūpe appaṇihitānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbapaṇidhīhi muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 「當認知時他轉回」為想的轉回；####

original: Rūpe suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ abhinivesato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 「當意圖時他轉回」為意向的轉回；

original: Vedanāya… pe… saññāya… saṅkhāresu… viññāṇe… cakkhusmiṃ… pe… jarāmaraṇe aniccānupassanāñāṇaṃ niccato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho… pe… jarāmaraṇe appaṇihitānupassanāñāṇaṃ sabbapaṇidhīhi muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 「當識知時他轉回」為心的轉回；

original: Jarāmaraṇe suññatānupassanāñāṇaṃ abhinivesato paṇidhiyā muccatīti– appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 「當作智時他轉回」為智的轉回；

original: Ayaṃ appaṇihito vimokkho.
content: 「當捨棄時他轉回」為解脫的轉回；

original: Ayaṃ vimokkho.
content: 「在真實義上他轉回」為諦的轉回。

original: 230. Katamaṃ mukhaṃ?
content: 想的轉回處即意向的轉回處；意向的轉回處即想的轉回處，####

original: Ye tattha jātā anavajjā kusalā bodhipakkhiyādhammā, idaṃ mukhaṃ.
content: 想的轉回、意向的轉回處即心的轉回處；####

original: Katamaṃ vimokkhamukhaṃ?
content: 心的轉回處即想的轉回、意向的轉回處，####

original: Yaṃ tesaṃ dhammānaṃ ārammaṇaṃ nirodho nibbānaṃ, idaṃ vimokkhamukhaṃ.
content: 想的轉回、意向的轉回、心的轉回處即智的轉回處；####

original: Vimokkhañca mukhañca vimokkhamukhaṃ, idaṃ vimokkhamukhaṃ.
content: 智的轉回處即想的轉回、意向的轉回、心的轉回處，####

original: Katamaṃ vimokkhapaccanīkaṃ?
content: 想的轉回、意向的轉回、心的轉回、智的轉回處即解脫的轉回處；####

original: Tīṇi akusalamūlāni vimokkhapaccanīkāni, tīṇi duccaritāni vimokkhapaccanīkāni, sabbepi akusalā dhammā vimokkhapaccanīkā, idaṃ vimokkhapaccanīkaṃ.
content: 解脫的轉回處即想的轉回、意向的轉回、心的轉回、智的轉回處，####

original: Katamaṃ vimokkhānulomaṃ?
content: 想的轉回、意向的轉回、心的轉回、智的轉回、解脫的轉回處即諦的轉回處；####

original: Tīṇi kusalamūlāni vimokkhānulomāni, tīṇi sucaritāni vimokkhānulomāni, sabbepi kusalā dhammā vimokkhānulomā, idaṃ vimokkhānulomaṃ.
content: 諦的轉回處即想的轉回、意向的轉回、心的轉回、智的轉回、解脫的轉回處。

original: Katamo vimokkhavivaṭṭo?
content: 什麼是解脫的修習？

original: Saññāvivaṭṭo, cetovivaṭṭo, cittavivaṭṭo, ñāṇavivaṭṭo, vimokkhavivaṭṭo, saccavivaṭṭo.
content: 對初禪以練習修習、[[bahulīkaroti#多作]]；對第二禪以練習修習、多作；對第三禪以練習修習、多作；對第四禪以練習修習、多作；對虛空無邊處等至以練習修習、多作；對識無邊處等至……（中略）對無所有處等至……對非想非非想處等至以練習修習、多作；對須陀洹道以練習修習、多作；對一來道以練習修習、多作；對不還道道以練習修習、多作；對阿羅漢道道以練習修習、多作，這是解脫的修習。

original: Sañjānanto vivaṭṭatīti– saññāvivaṭṭo.
content: 什麼是解脫的安息？

original: Cetayanto vivaṭṭatīti– cetovivaṭṭo.
content: 初禪的得到或果報；第二禪的得到或果報；第三禪的……（中略）第四禪的得到或果報；虛空無邊處等至的……識無邊處等至的……無所有處等至的……非想非非想處等至的得到或果報；對須陀洹道為須陀洹果；對一來道為一來果；對不還道為不還果；對阿羅漢道為阿羅漢果，這是解脫的安息。

original: Vijānanto vivaṭṭatīti– cittavivaṭṭo.
content: 第三誦分[終了]。

original: Ñāṇaṃ karonto vivaṭṭatīti– ñāṇavivaṭṭo.
content: 解脫的談論終了。

original: Vosajjanto vivaṭṭatīti– vimokkhavivaṭṭo.
Tathaṭṭhena vivaṭṭatīti– saccavivaṭṭo.
Yattha saññāvivaṭṭo tattha cetovivaṭṭo, yattha cetovivaṭṭo tattha saññāvivaṭṭo, yattha saññāvivaṭṭo cetovivaṭṭo tattha cittavivaṭṭo, yattha cittavivaṭṭo tattha saññāvivaṭṭo cetovivaṭṭo.
Yattha saññāvivaṭṭo cetovivaṭṭo cittavivaṭṭo tattha ñāṇavivaṭṭo, yattha ñāṇavivaṭṭo tattha saññāvivaṭṭo cetovivaṭṭo cittavivaṭṭo.
Yattha saññāvivaṭṭo cetovivaṭṭo cittavivaṭṭo ñāṇavivaṭṭo tattha vimokkhavivaṭṭo, yattha vimokkhavivaṭṭo tattha saññāvivaṭṭo cetovivaṭṭo cittavivaṭṭo ñāṇavivaṭṭo.
Yattha saññāvivaṭṭo cetovivaṭṭo cittavivaṭṭo ñāṇavivaṭṭo vimokkhavivaṭṭo tattha saccavivaṭṭo, yattha saccavivaṭṭo tattha saññāvivaṭṭo cetovivaṭṭo cittavivaṭṭo ñāṇavivaṭṭo vimokkhavivaṭṭo.
Ayaṃ vimokkhavivaṭṭo.
Katamā vimokkhabhāvanā?

Paṭhamassa jhānassa āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, dutiyassa jhānassa āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, tatiyassa jhānassa āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, catutthassa jhānassa āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, ākāsānañcāyatanasamāpattiyā āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, viññāṇañcāyatanasamāpattiyā… pe… ākiñcaññāyatanasamāpattiyā… nevasaññānāsaññāyatanasamāpattiyā āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, sotāpattimaggassa āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, sakadāgāmimaggassa āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, anāgāmimaggassa āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, arahattamaggassa āsevanā bhāvanā bahulīkammaṃ, ayaṃ vimokkhabhāvanā.
Katamā vimokkhappaṭippassaddhi?

Paṭhamassa jhānassa paṭilābho vā vipāko vā, dutiyassa jhānassa paṭilābho vā vipāko vā, tatiyassa jhānassa… pe… catutthassa jhānassa… ākāsānañcāyatanasamāpattiyā… viññāṇañcāyatanasamāpattiyā… ākiñcaññāyatanasamāpattiyā… nevasaññānāsaññāyatanasamāpattiyā paṭilābho vā vipāko vā, sotāpattimaggassa sotāpattiphalaṃ, sakadāgāmimaggassa sakadāgāmiphalaṃ, anāgāmimaggassa anāgāmiphalaṃ, arahattamaggassa arahattaphalaṃ, ayaṃ vimokkhappaṭippassaddhīti.
Tatiyabhāṇavāro .
Vimokkhakathā niṭṭhitā.
